zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford於1378年3月2日出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford43歲，母親Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP44歲。他於1398年6月28日與Anne of Gloucester結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年25歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh-hans.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford于1378年3月2日出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford43岁，母亲Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP44岁。他于1398年6月28日与Anne of Gloucester结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年7月21日在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年25岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford was born on 2 March 1378, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, was 43 and his mother, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, was 44. He married Anne of Gloucester on 28 June 1398. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford est né le 2 mars 1378, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Anne of Gloucester le 28 juin 1398. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford am 2. März 1378 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford 43 und seine Mutter Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP 44. Er hat am 28. Juni 1398 Anne of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford è nato il il 2 marzo 1378 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Anne of Gloucester il 28 giugno 1398. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

ja.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォード
ja.Stafford Castle, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Stone, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアストーン
ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Staffordが1378年3月2日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordは43歳，母Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMPは44歳であった。1398年6月28日にAnne of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月21日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで25歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford(이)가 1378년 3월 2일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1398년 6월 28일 Anne of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.2 March 1378–21 July 1403: 1378 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 2–1403 оны Долоодугаар сарын 21

pt.2 March 1378–21 July 1403: 2 de março de 1378–21 de julho de 1403
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford nasceu em 2 de março de 1378, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne of Gloucester em 28 de junho de 1398. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford родился 2 марта 1378 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne of Gloucester 28 июня 1398 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.2 March 1378–21 July 1403: 2 de marzo de 1378–21 de julio de 1403
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Stafford 5th Earl of Stafford nació el 2 de marzo de 1378, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Anne of Gloucester el 28 de junio de 1398. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
